subcodes.first_line: O Bahram of the celestial sphere, O thou of auspicious end! Thy letter, like unto thy name, is filled with portent, and thy pen, like unto the reed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بهرام سپهر ای خوش فرجام نامه ات چون نامت پرشکون و خامه ات چون کلک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @fire and light; fire and water
